diagrams.title: Transaction State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the lifecycle of a transaction from active state through committed or aborted states
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how transactions progress and the states they can be in during execution

diagrams.title: Precedence Graph for Serializability Test
diagrams.description: Directed graph showing dependencies between transactions based on conflicting operations
diagrams.purpose: Testing whether a concurrent schedule is conflict-serializable by checking for cycles

diagrams.title: ACID Properties Illustration
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the four properties using a bank transfer example
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing and understanding the fundamental transaction properties with real-world context

diagrams.title: Conflict Types in Schedules
diagrams.description: Shows different types of conflicts between concurrent transactions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding which operation pairs cause conflicts in concurrent schedules
